content: You are an AI agent. (system prompt elided in fixture)

<system-reminder>
You are running in non-interactive mode. The user cannot answer questions or provide feedback during execution.
- Do NOT call AskUserQuestion. If you need to make a decision, make your best judgment and proceed.
- For EnterPlanMode / ExitPlanMode, they will be auto-approved. You can use them normally but expect no user feedback.
</system-reminder>
